description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request. The workflow consists of two jobs: build and tests. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, logs in to the GitHub Container registry, builds and pushes two Docker images (pepy and pepy-test) with tags including the commit SHA. The tests job depends on the build job, runs on ubuntu-latest with read permission to packages, logs in to the Container registry, starts the environment, and runs tests using make.
